details.test: Task 1: iPhone 12 128GB quote with highest-paying payout method added to cart
Task 2: Compare Apple vs Samsung phones by payout and start trade-in for higher-value model
Task 3: Create multi-phone trade-in cart and set order-level payout to store credit
Task 4: Lock phone quote for 30 days and start checkout with locked quote
Task 5: Schedule earliest partner drop-off appointment near ZIP 94103
Task 6: Select cheapest ship-my-devices option and generate/download prepaid label
Task 7: Register account and set bank transfer as default payout preference
Task 8: Trade in specific phone by model number in Fair condition and add to cart
Task 9: Apply BONUS10 promo and choose lump-sum payout at checkout
